products.name: Nourishing Baby Bath & Shampoo
products.description: An ultra-gentle 2-in-1 bath and shampoo for babies' delicate skin and hair. Cleanses without disrupting the natural barrier.
products.how_to_use: Dilute in warm bath water or apply directly to wet hair and skin, lather lightly and rinse well.

products.name: Soft Baby Lotion
products.description: A silky baby lotion that keeps skin soft and comfortable all day. Formulated to support the developing skin barrier.
products.how_to_use: Massage onto baby’s skin after bath or whenever required, focusing on dry areas.

products.name: Ultra Rich Baby Cream
products.description: A thick but spreadable baby cream for very dry patches. Helps comfort rough elbows, knees and cheeks.
products.how_to_use: Use a small amount on problem areas throughout the day or as a nightly intensive treatment.

products.name: Gentle Baby Milk Powder Cleanser

concerns: Dryness, dehydration, and maintaining the skin's moisture barrier

products.description: A soothing milk powder cleanser for quick sponge baths. Leaves baby’s skin feeling fresh and comfortable.
products.how_to_use: Mix with warm water to form a milky liquid, then sponge gently over baby’s skin and pat dry.

products.name: Baby Barrier Cream
products.description: A protective barrier cream that helps prevent dryness and irritation in delicate areas. Creates a breathable shield on baby’s skin.
products.how_to_use: Apply a thin layer on clean, dry skin as often as needed, especially after diaper changes.
